title: ANC - 3b.-Change ANC from Adaptive to Standard and vice versa during call when Transparency is ON before call
scenario: ANC mode switching between Adaptive and Standard during a call with Transparency pre-enabled results in different post-call ANC/Transparency behavior across Emu/Osprey/Tern vs Lark/Peregrine devices
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app and navigate to Home screen.
2. Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
3. Go to Audio Settings → ANC and ensure ANC Mode is OFF and set to either Adaptive or Standard.
4. Go to Audio Settings → Transparency Mode and ensure it is ON and set to either Environment or Speech.
5. Start or join a call (e.g., Zoom, Teams, or Mobile call).
6. Observe that ANC turns ON with the previously selected option (Adaptive or Standard), and Transparency becomes greyed out and OFF.
7. Tap the Transparency toggle in Audio Settings.
8. Observe the popup informing that Transparency is not available during a call.
9. In Audio Settings → ANC, change the ANC mode between Adaptive and Standard.
10. Verify that the user can switch between Adaptive and Standard during the call.
12. On Emu/Osprey/Tern devices: Verify that ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to OFF (with its previous value retained).
13. On Lark/Peregrine devices: Verify that ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call, and Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to ON (with its previous value retained).
14. Tap the ANC and Transparency toggles and verify the user can move between ANC and Transparency modes.
expected: On Emu/Osprey/Tern devices: After the call, ANC stays ON with the value selected during the call, Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to OFF with its previous value retained. On Lark/Peregrine devices: After the call, ANC turns OFF with the value selected during the call, Transparency becomes accessible again and is set to ON with its previous value retained. In both cases, the user can toggle between ANC and Transparency modes freely after the call.
